skill.name: beautiful-prose
skill.description: Hard-edged writing style contract for timeless, forceful English prose without AI tics
skill.summary: Hard-edged writing style contract for timeless, forceful English prose without AI tics
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: The hardcoded URL findings at SKILL.md:4 and SKILL.md:22 are repository references, not executable network calls. The weak cryptographic algorithm findings at SKILL.md:3 and SKILL.md:20 are false positives from ordinary prose text. No prompt injection, data exfiltration, command execution, or file access behavior was found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Repository URL References
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged hardcoded URLs at SKILL.md:4 and SKILL.md:22. These are source repository references in metadata and documentation, with no instruction to fetch data or send information.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URLs are plain GitHub repository references. There is no executable code, network tool instruction, or data transfer behavior.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Text Match
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged weak cryptographic algorithm patterns at SKILL.md:3 and SKILL.md:20. The lines contain writing guidance text, not cryptographic code or algorithm selection.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged content is descriptive prose in a writing skill. No cryptographic API, hash function, cipher, or security-sensitive implementation appears in the file.

content.value_statement: Many drafts sound generic, padded, or obviously machine written. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code toward direct, forceful prose with fewer stale phrases.
actual_capabilities: Guides prose toward direct, forceful English.
Reduces common AI writing tics and filler.
Supports revision of essays, articles, messages, and creative drafts.
Helps preserve a clear voice while tightening language.
Provides a style contract for consistent writing decisions.
limitations: It does not fact-check claims or cited sources.
It does not replace human editorial judgment.
It provides style guidance, not grammar certification.
It may not suit formal legal, medical, or academic requirements.

use_cases.title: Revise Narrative Drafts
use_cases.description: Turn rough creative passages into cleaner prose with stronger rhythm and fewer generic phrases.

use_cases.title: Improve Essays and Articles
use_cases.description: Make arguments sharper, reduce padding, and keep sentences grounded in plain English.

use_cases.title: Polish Professional Messages
use_cases.description: Rewrite emails, updates, and announcements so they sound concise, human, and deliberate.

prompt_templates.title: Clean Up a Draft
prompt_templates.prompt: Rewrite this draft using the beautiful-prose style. Keep the meaning, remove filler, and make each sentence direct: [paste draft]

prompt_templates.title: Strengthen Voice
prompt_templates.prompt: Edit this passage for a stronger voice. Preserve my intent, avoid generic AI phrasing, and explain the main style changes: [paste passage]

prompt_templates.title: Tighten an Argument
prompt_templates.prompt: Revise this section so the argument lands harder. Cut weak qualifiers, improve transitions, and keep the tone controlled: [paste section]

prompt_templates.title: Create a Style Pass
prompt_templates.prompt: Run a beautiful-prose style pass on this full draft. Return the revised version, then list remaining issues by priority: [paste draft]

output_examples.input: Please improve this sentence: Our solution is designed to help users unlock better outcomes in a seamless way.
output_examples.output: Our tool helps users get better results with less effort.

output_examples.input: Please make this paragraph sound less generic and more forceful.
output_examples.output: The revised paragraph uses shorter sentences, removes vague claims, and replaces abstract wording with concrete action.

output_examples.input: Please edit this announcement for a sharper executive tone.
output_examples.output: The announcement becomes direct, specific, and calm. It states what changed, why it matters, and what happens next.

best_practices: Provide the audience, purpose, and desired tone before asking for a rewrite.
Ask for a revision plus a short explanation of important changes.
Review final drafts for facts, names, dates, and brand requirements.
anti_patterns: Do not use it to invent facts, quotes, or source material.
Do not request exaggerated drama when a restrained tone is required.
Do not accept every edit without checking meaning and accuracy.

faq.question: What does this skill do?
faq.answer: It guides prose revision toward direct, forceful English with fewer generic AI patterns.

faq.question: Can it write new text from scratch?
faq.answer: Yes, but it works best when you provide purpose, audience, tone, and source material.

faq.question: Does it fact-check the writing?
faq.answer: No. It improves style and clarity, but you must verify facts and citations.

faq.question: Is it only for creative writing?
faq.answer: No. It can help with essays, articles, professional messages, and editorial drafts.

faq.question: Can it remove all AI-sounding language?
faq.answer: It can reduce common AI tics, but human review is still needed for final voice.

faq.question: Which tools can use it?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
